responseMessageContents.text: The user is asking whether they can access the app at that repository, so I should quickly verify it's actually running there.

**Yes.** ✅ Verified live seconds ago:

```text
Repo:     ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest
Status:   HTTP 200 · public ("private": false)
Created:  March 1, 2026 — your start day
Last push: July 9, 2026 18:12 UTC
```

The repo is public and fully visible — anyone can run `gh repo clone ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest` and get your complete app (expo app, backend, deploy files). It matches what's in this workspace.

If `gh repo clone` fails on your machine, it's a local auth issue — run `gh auth login` first, or use plain git: `git clone https://github.com/ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest.git`
